title: Valuation and Dividend Safety Analysis: Dow
text: Dow Inc (NYSE:DOW) is a large chemical manufacturer with market-leading positions in plastic products.

title: DuPont: Fairly Valued Shares Following A Q4 Rally, Positive Technicals For 2023
text: The Materials sector has powered the S&P 500 higher since early October. Chemicals equities, while there is no ETF, are an investable group featuring strong momentum and still reasonable valuations.

title: DuPont (DD) Up 32% in 6 Months: What's Behind the Rally?
text: DuPont (DD) gains on strong demand in semiconductor, water and industrial end-markets, investment in new product development and pricing actions.
